info.name: SlimeDoesGamez API Collection
info.description: Latest API collection generated from current routes/controllers/services.

item.name: Get All Categories
item.description: Get all categories with subcategories. Pass serviceId to filter by specific service.

item.name: Get Category by ID
item.description: Get single category by ID with all its subcategories.

request.description: Current controller expects email, newPassword and confirmPassword.

item.name: Get User by ID
item.description: Get user profile by ID. Users can retrieve their own profile using their user token. Admins can retrieve any user profile using admin token.

item.name: Change Password
item.description: Change password for authenticated user. User ID is extracted from the token. Requires current password verification and minimum 8 characters for new password.

item.name: Get User by ID
item.description: Get user profile by ID (Admin version). Admins can retrieve any user profile using admin token.

item.name: Change Password
item.description: Change password for any user (Admin version). Admins can change their own or any other user's password by passing userId in request body. Requires current password verification and minimum 8 characters for new password.

query.description: Search by product name or description
Filter by service ID, or use 'ALL' for all services

formdata.value: High-quality 100% cotton t-shirt for custom printing

formdata.description: Optional: New product images to replace existing ones (max 5 files)

query.description: Filter by service ID, or use 'ALL' for all services
Filter by category ID, or use 'ALL' for all categories. Takes precedence over serviceId.

item.name: Get Dashboard Overview
item.description: Get comprehensive dashboard overview including revenue, order statistics, growth percentages, monthly sales data, and top selling categories.
